task_completion.description: Log in to GeoServer and navigate to the Tile Layers configuration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The GeoServer web administration interface is visible, logged in as admin, with the 'Tile Layers' page open from the left-hand menu under Tile Caching.

task_completion.description: Select the ne:ne_countries layer for tile caching configuration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Edit Layer' page is open for the 'ne:ne_countries' layer, specifically showing the 'Tile Caching' tab.

task_completion.description: Configure the EPSG:900913 gridset and image/png format for the layer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Tile Caching tab for ne:ne_countries, 'image/png' is checked under Tile Image Formats, and 'EPSG:900913' is added/visible in the Available Gridsets table.

task_completion.description: Set the metatiling factor to 4x4 or larger.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Tile Caching tab, the Metatiling width and height fields are both set to 4 (or a larger number).

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Seed/Truncate page and select the correct gridset and format for seeding.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'GWC Seed Task' or 'Seed/Truncate' page is open for 'ne:ne_countries'. The Grid Set dropdown is set to 'EPSG:4326' and the Format dropdown is set to 'image/png'.

task_completion.description: Configure zoom levels 0 to 3, full world extent, and submit the seed task.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the Seed Task page, Zoom start is 0, Zoom stop is 3, the Bounding box fields show -180, -90, 180, 90, and there is evidence of the task being submitted (e.g., clicking the Submit button or showing the active/queued task in the GWC status page).

integrity.description: The agent used the GeoServer web interface to configure settings and trigger seeding.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the GeoServer web GUI (http://localhost:8080/geoserver/web/) rather than executing curl commands or REST API scripts in a terminal.

integrity.description: The agent modified the actual ne:ne_countries layer settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: The layer name 'ne:ne_countries' is clearly visible in the GeoServer Edit Layer and Seed Task headers, not typed into a text editor or a mocked HTML page.

integrity.description: The agent actually submitted the seed task rather than just filling out the form.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent clicks the 'Submit' button on the seed task page, and ideally a screenshot shows the task queued or running in the GeoWebCache task list.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target layer: ne:ne_countries. Required caching config: EPSG:900913 gridset, image/png format, metatiling >= 4x4. Required seeding config: EPSG:4326 gridset, image/png format, zoom levels 0 to 3, full world extent (minX=-180, minY=-90, maxX=180, maxY=90).
